code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let key = "\n#{current}\n"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{current}\n"
          count = count + 1
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  let key = "\n#{current}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
